meta_title: For Founders: freelance pitching to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Freelance Pitching to Solve 'No Project Ideas'
content.seo_description: Stop guessing what to build. Learn how to use freelance pitching to uncover high-ticket SaaS problems. A guide for founders using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop searching for 'ideas' and start solving 'pain'. By pitching freelance services to niche businesses, you gain direct access to their internal operational bottlenecks. These paid engagements validate market demand, provide immediate cash flow, and reveal the exact high-value SaaS products your target customers are desperate to buy.
content.intro:
The blank screen is a founder's graveyard. You've spent weeks scrolling Product Hunt and Reddit, waiting for a 'eureka' moment that never comes. Meanwhile, thousands of small businesses are bleeding time and money on manual processes, silently praying for a tool that doesn't exist yet.

The secret isn't in your imagination; it's in their infrastructure. By pivoting from 'idea-first' to 'service-first', you stop being a dreamer and start being a consultant. You don't need a product to start; you need a pitch that solves a problem so painful they'll pay you to fix it manually—before you ever write a line of production code.

steps.title: Identify a High-Value Niche
steps.description: Select a niche with high transaction volume and legacy software. We are looking for industries that still rely on spreadsheets for critical workflows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze common operational bottlenecks for [Niche/Industry] and identify 5 repetitive, high-friction tasks that are ripe for automation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Research the top 5 pain points for [Niche] businesses regarding manual data entry and reporting.'

steps.title: Craft a 'Service-to-SaaS' Pitch
steps.description: Don't sell software; sell a result. Pitch a consulting package to solve the identified bottleneck manually.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a cold outreach email that offers a consulting service to solve [Pain Point]. Focus on ROI and time saved rather than features.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file outreach_template.md --content 'Draft a high-conversion cold email for [Role] at [Company] focusing on solving [Pain Point].'

steps.title: Build the Manual MVP (Concierge)
steps.description: Before automating, execute the workflow manually. This proves the logic and builds trust with your first paying client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Python script structure to automate [Workflow Step] using the client's existing data format.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --command 'mkdir mvp_scripts && cd mvp_scripts && touch process.py'

steps.title: Extract the SaaS Core
steps.description: Identify the repeatable logic from your manual service. This is the blueprint for your future SaaS product.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the code from my manual service and extract the core business logic into a modular class structure for a potential SaaS API.

steps.title: Deploy the Prototype
steps.description: Use your refined logic to deploy a lightweight web interface that allows the client to self-serve.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a FastAPI endpoint that consumes the [SaaS Core] logic and accepts JSON input for processing.

pro_tips: Always charge for the manual service. If they won't pay for the manual labor, they won't pay for the software.
Look for 'spreadsheet sprawl'—if a business uses 5+ linked Excel sheets to run a process, that is your billion-dollar opportunity.
Use Claude Code to document your client's unique edge cases; these are your future 'killer features' that competitors won't have.
Keep your initial MVP scope to exactly one feature that saves them 5+ hours a week.
Focus on the 'Time-to-Value' metric. If you can deliver the first result in under 48 hours, you have a customer for life.
content.next_steps: Once your first client is successfully using your manual workflow, transition them to a monthly subscription for the automated tool. Use this revenue to fund further development and scale your outreach.
content.conversion_block: You now have a proven framework to turn problems into profit without needing a single original 'idea'. Stop waiting for inspiration and start solving real-world friction today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
